reviews.comment:
Siempre tienen buena atención,  loa playeros super amables. Hay que ir con tiempo porque la mayoría de las veces hay cola para cargar nafta. Hay buenos descuentos por ser socio del ACA y  por la app YPF. Voy hace años y siempre atienden con buena onda y son serviciales.

(Translated by Google)
They always provide great service, and the attendants are super friendly. You should arrive early because there's usually a line to fill up. There are good discounts for ACA members and through the YPF app. I've been going for years, and they're always friendly and helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxeHZ2dW53RRAB
